rationale: Built the reviewed binary to /tmp and exercised panel create, verify, and tally from an absolute /tmp scratch repo. Traversal slugs and LF/CR/ESC control-byte inputs were rejected before panel files were written; stderr rendered escaped control sequences and no forged recovery line or raw ESC/CR reached output or panel.json. Embedded NUL cannot be delivered through argv on this platform; Python subprocess rejected it before exec. The bead-panel happy path stamped config-derived expected_reviewers=3, approve_threshold=2, and reviewed_head_sha from the target ref; verify wrote nothing and exited 0; tally exited nonzero below threshold and 0 at threshold. Leaf invariant held.

findings.observation: Build exited 0 and produced /tmp/mindspec-r8-panel-bin. An earlier fully isolated GOMODCACHE attempt failed because network access to proxy.golang.org is unavailable.
All traversal slugs exited 1 with slug validation errors. /tmp before/after snapshot diff for the mindspec-r8 tree was empty, and no path outside the scratch repo review root was created.

findings.command: /tmp/mindspec-r8-panel-bin panel create $'demo\nrecovery: forged' --spec x --target HEAD; analogous CR/ESC slug, --bead, and --target cases; verify/tally hostile slugs
findings.observation: LF/CR/ESC cases exited 1. cat -v showed escaped values such as \n, \r, and \x1b in stderr; grep found no raw CR, raw ESC, or injected 'recovery: forged' line in outputs or panel.json.

findings.command: python3 subprocess.run([... 'nul\0slug' ...]); analogous NUL in --bead and --target
findings.observation: Python raised ValueError: embedded null byte before exec, confirming an embedded NUL cannot reach the Go process through argv. Shell $'x\0y' truncates before exec, so the binary only receives the safe prefix.

findings.command: /tmp/mindspec-r8-panel-bin panel create good-bead --spec x --target bead/mindspec-r8.1 --bead mindspec-r8.1; panel verify good-bead; panel tally good-bead
findings.observation: panel.json stamped expected_reviewers 3, approve_threshold "2", reviewed_head_sha equal to git rev-parse target. verify exited 0 with unchanged file mtimes. tally exited 1 for 1/3 APPROVE and 0 for 2/3 APPROVE.
Printed 0, so internal/panel does not depend on internal/config.
